name: Strats Trust For Procter & Gambel Security CTF 2006-1
summary: Strats Trust For Procter & Gambel Security CTF 2006-1 is a unit investment trust holding securities related to Procter & Gamble, distributing income to its unitholders. The trust was formed in 2006 and is managed by a financial institution. It is focused on income derived from Procter & Gamble securities.
